title: Amtech T0707 40mm Long Shackle Rhombic Chrome Plated Iron Padlock
features: DURABLE: This 40mm rhombic padlock has a chrome plated iron body with a protective plastic cover and an extra long anti-saw, anti-cut 6mm diameter hardened steel shackle
TAMPER RESISTANT: Supplied with 3 keys, it has an anti-pick precision pin tumbler and domino key mechanism
EASY TO HANDLE: Ergonomic build supports fatigue-free use
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer 40mm long shackle rhombic chrome plated iron padlock Chrome-plated iron body with plastic cover 6 mm diameter hardened steel shackle Shackle internal dimensions 20 x 64 mm Durable brass lock barrel Supplied with 3 keys See More

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Securing doors, gates, suitcases, and other items that require a physical lock.
specifications_table.Included Components: Amtech T0707 40Mm Long Shackle Rhombic Chrome Plated Iron Padlock
